customer.created.description: Triggered when a new customer is created in Stripe

customer.updated.description: Triggered when a customer object is updated

customer.deleted.description: Triggered when a customer is deleted from Stripe

customer.subscription.created.description: Triggered when a new subscription is created for a customer

customer.subscription.updated.description: Triggered when a subscription is updated (plan change, quantity change, etc.)

customer.subscription.deleted.description: Triggered when a subscription is canceled and reaches the end of its billing period

customer.subscription.paused.description: Triggered when a subscription is paused

customer.subscription.resumed.description: Triggered when a paused subscription is resumed

customer.subscription.trial_will_end.description: Triggered three days before a subscription trial period ends

invoice.created.description: Triggered when a new invoice is created

invoice.finalized.description: Triggered when a draft invoice is finalized and ready for payment

invoice.paid.description: Triggered when an invoice is successfully paid

invoice.payment_succeeded.description: Triggered when payment for an invoice succeeds

invoice.payment_failed.description: Triggered when payment for an invoice fails

invoice.upcoming.description: Triggered a few days before a subscription invoice is due to be created

payment_intent.created.description: Triggered when a new payment intent is created

payment_intent.succeeded.description: Triggered when a payment intent successfully completes a payment

payment_intent.payment_failed.description: Triggered when a payment intent fails to complete a payment

payment_intent.canceled.description: Triggered when a payment intent is canceled

charge.succeeded.description: Triggered when a charge is successfully completed

charge.failed.description: Triggered when a charge attempt fails

charge.refunded.description: Triggered when a charge is refunded (fully or partially)

checkout.session.completed.description: Triggered when a Checkout Session is successfully completed by a customer

checkout.session.expired.description: Triggered when a Checkout Session expires before completion

product.created.description: Triggered when a new product is created in the catalog

product.updated.description: Triggered when a product is updated

product.deleted.description: Triggered when a product is deleted from the catalog

price.created.description: Triggered when a new price is created for a product

price.updated.description: Triggered when a price is updated

price.deleted.description: Triggered when a price is deleted

id.description: Unique identifier for the event (e.g. evt_1234)

object.description: String representing the object type, always 'event'

api_version.description: The Stripe API version used to render data in this event (e.g. 2023-10-16)

created.description: Time at which the event was created, measured in seconds since the Unix epoch

data.description: Object containing the resource affected by the event. Includes 'object' (the full API resource, e.g. Customer, Subscription, Invoice) and optionally 'previous_attributes' with changed field values before the update

livemode.description: Whether the event was generated in live mode (true) or test mode (false)

pending_webhooks.description: Number of webhooks that have yet to be successfully delivered for this event

request.description: Information on the API request that triggered the event. Contains 'id' (request identifier) and 'idempotency_key' if one was used

type.description: Description of the event type (e.g. customer.created, invoice.payment_succeeded)
